scripts.build:jsos-app: zip -r pi-coding-agent.zip bin/ cli.sh icon.svg package.json README.md patch.js
scripts.git:tag: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('git tag v'+v+' && git push origin v'+v,{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Tagged and pushed v'+v)"

description.en: Pi is a minimal agent harness.
description.zh-CN: Pi 是一个极简的编程代理框架。
